summary: End-to-end testing of AERI DHL Rate Calculator. 15/15 backend pytest cases passed (auth, countries, settings CRUD, calculate USA/UK/UAE/unknown/volumetric/>30kg/auth-guard). 9/9 frontend Playwright checks passed (login page, invalid login error, valid login redirect, dashboard tabs, country dropdown with 233 countries, weight + shipment-type, calculate -> breakdown showing total ₹6,275.83 for USA 5kg nondoc matching backend, settings sheet open/save, zones tab + country search, logout). No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 141: seed_settings queries find_one but doc may have been saved with _key; query excludes _id only (not _key). Works but inconsistent with get_settings which excludes both.
CORS allow_origins uses wildcard '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests. Acceptable since app uses Bearer tokens (not cookies), but worth noting.
JWT_SECRET has a fallback default in code — acceptable for dev, but production should require the env var.
_round_up_weight: shipment_type parameter is unused. Minor code smell.
Gulf surcharge codes are hardcoded inside calculate(); consider moving to Settings for configurability per spec (admin-configurable surcharges).
seed_data_creation: None. Admin user + default settings are auto-seeded on backend startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 15 tests). All endpoints require Bearer auth except /api/auth/login and /api/. USA 5kg nondoc = ₹6,275.83 total (zone 12). UK 0.5kg doc = zone 7. UAE 45kg nondoc with LWH includes both Gulf (4680) and heavy carton (3540) surcharges in notes. Frontend data-testids are complete and working. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://logistics-rate-calc.preview.emergentagent.com.
